title: Happy Jumping Dolphin Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Happy Jumping Dolphin Coloring Page - Free PDF | ColoringPalace
seoDescription: Download and print this easy happy jumping dolphin coloring sheet. Perfect for toddlers and young kids with thick outlines and large coloring spaces. High-resolution free vector PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The Jumping Dolphin belongs to the family of toothed whales, communicating through complex clicks, whistles, and body language.
The Jumping Dolphin frequently plays in the wake of boats and jumps out of the water to look around or shed parasites.
